message:
test(connector-registry): add property-based tests for trust policy, manifest validation, and digest verification

28 proptest suites covering:
- TrustLevel: allows_install invariant, as_str/Display stability
- TrustPolicy.evaluate(): blocked→Blocked, unsigned→Untrusted, known→Trusted, unknown→Conditional, determinism
- TrustPolicy.gate(): allows_install↔pass invariant, excess capability rejection
- ConnectorManifest.validate(): valid passes, empty id/version/bad digest/bad schema fail
- Digest: determinism, 64-hex output, self-consistency, tamper detection
- Serde roundtrips: ConnectorManifest, TrustPolicy, TrustLevel, PackageStatus, VerificationOutcome, VerificationRecord, RegistryTelemetrySnapshot
- ConnectorRegistryClient: correct digest registration, wrong digest rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
